request.title: Aegis Routing Prompt Request
request.description: An evaluation of a natural language text prompt routed by the Aegis Engine.

userId.description: The unique identifier of the authenticated developer.

originalPrompt.description: The raw natural language prompt submitted for routing.

estimatedTokens.description: Simulated token count of the prompt.

targetModelRouted.description: The target model selected by the routing engine.

costSavedUSD.description: Difference value representing cost savings in USD.

requests/{requestId}.description: Collection of developer prompt routing evaluations and performance stats.
